verses.text: Nebukhadnezzar kumpipa in leitung-a om minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh tungah a nuai-a thute hih bangin a khak hi: “Note tungah nopna om ta hen
A Lianpen Pasian in kei tungah lim leh na lamdang a hong lahna thute ka hong gen nuam hi
“Pasian' hong lah na lamdangte, bangzahin lian ahi hiam? A bawl na lamdangte, bangzahin vanglian ahi hiam? A tawntungin Pasian kumpi hi ding a, amah in a tawntungin a uk paisuak ding hi
“Keimah Nebukhadnezzar lung-nuam takin kumpi inn-ah ka teng a, nuamsa mahmahin ka om hi
Ahih hangin ka ihmut laitakin a lauhuai mang khat ka man a, a dipkuathuai maang ka mu hi
Ka mangmat a khiatna a hong hilh dingin Babylon gam kumpi thudotte khempeuh a hong paina dingun thu ka pia hi
Tua ciangin aisan theite, mitphial siamte, khongkhai theite, aksi et siamte khempeuh hong pai uh a, amaute kiangah ka mang ka gen hi. Ahih hangin a khiatna a hong gen thei kei uh hi
Tua ciangin Daniel (a min ding Betashazzar, ka pasian' min tamin a kiphuakpa) a hong pai hi. Pasian' kha ama sungah om ahih ciangin ama kiangah ka mangmat ka gen hi
Ama kiangah, aisan theite laka a lianpen Betashazzar aw, Pasian' kha na sungah om ahih manin thuthuk khempeuh na theih theihlam ka thei hi. Hih ka mang a khiatna hong gen in, ka ci hi
“Ka ihmut laitakin maangmuhna khat ka nei a, leitung laizangah a po singkung sang mahmah khat ka mu hi
Tua singkung pen khangkhangin gol semsem a, vantung dong banto ahih ciangin leitung mi khempeuh in a mu thei uh hi
A tehte hoih mahmah a, leitung bup khamkhop ding gah a gah hi. Gamsate in a liim beel uh a, vasate in a hiang kawmah bu bawl uh a, a nungta thei khempeuh in a gah a ne uh hi
“Ka maangmuhna ngaihsunin ka om laitakin ka khuadak leh a vil, a patau vantung mi khat vantung pan a hong tuaksuk ka mu hi
Amah nakpi-in kiko-in, ‘A singkung phuk in la, a hiangteng sattan in. A tehteng heuhsiang in la, a gahteng thehthang in. A nuai-a ganhingteng leh a hiang tunga vasateng hawlkhia in
Ahih hangin a bul leh leisunga a zungte nusia in. Sik leh sumngo kual tawh vial in la, gamlak lopate tawh nusia khawm in. Hih mipa tungah daitui kai hen la, ganhingte leh lopate tawh omkhawm hen
Amah in mihing lungsim nei nawnloin, kum sagih sung ganhing lungsim a nei ding hi

Hih pen a vil, a patau vantung mi' thukhenna ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin mun khempeuhah a om mi khempeuhte in, a Lian Pasian in mite' kumpi gamah vai a hawm hi, cih a thei ding uh hi. Amah in a teel peuhpeuh a neupente nangawn kumpi a suaksak thei ding hi,’ a ci hi

“Beltashazzar aw, keimah Nebukhadnezzar Kumpipa in ka mangmat pen hih bang ahi hi. Tu-in a khiatna hong gen in. Ka thudot mite khat beek a khiatna a hong gen thei a om kei uh hi. Ahi zongin nang' sungah Pasian' kha om ahih manin na hong gen thei ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Beltashazzar zong a kici Daniel lungmang lua ahih manin tawmvei sung bangmah gen theiloin a om hi. Kumpipa in, Beltashazzar aw, mang leh a khiatna huhau-in na lung mangsak zenzen kei in, a ci hi. Beltashazzar in, Kumpipa aw, nang mangmat leh a khiatna pen na galte tungah tungzaw hen, a ci hi
Singkung sang mahmah na muh pen hong khangkhang a, khauh mahmah a, vantung dong banto a, leitungah a teng mi khempeuh in a mu thei uh hi
A tehte hoih mahmah a, leitung bup a vakzo ding gah a gah hi. Gamsate, a nuai-ah tawlnga uh a, vasate in a hiang kawmah bu a bawl uh hi
Kumpipa aw, nang pen tua singkung na hi hi. Nang na lian a, na thahat hi. Nakpi takin khangin lian mahmah na hih manin vantung dong na banto a, leitung khempeuhah na vangliatna kizel hi

Kumpipa in na et laitakin, vantung mi khat vantung panin hong paisuk a, “A singkung phuk in la susia in; ahih hangin leisungah a bul leh a zungte nusia in. A bulah sik leh sumngo kual vial in la, gamlak lopate tawh nusiakhawm in. A tungah daitui kia hen la, kum sagih sung ganhingte tawh omkhawm ta hen,” a ci hi
Kumpipa aw, a khiatna pen hih bang ahi hi. A Lian Pasian in nang tungah a hong tung ding a thukhennasa a hong lak ahi hi

Mite sung panin hong kihawlkhia ding a, gamsate tawh na tengkhawm ding hi. Bawngtal bangin lopa na ne ding a, a pualamah lumin, kum sagih sung na tungah daitui a hong kia ding hi. Tua ciangin a Lian Pasian in mihingte' kumpi gam uk a, a teel mi peuhpeuh kumpi suaksak thei hi, na ci ding hi
Vantung mi in singbul leh a zungte leisungah nusiat dingin thu a pia hi. Tua pen, Pasian in leitung khempeuh uk hi, cih na theih ciangin kumpi na suakkik ding hi, a cihnopna ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa aw, kong thuhilhna hong mang in. Mawhna bawl nawn kei in la, diktakin gamta in. Mizawngte hehpih leteh, tua in a sia-a na gamtatnasate hong puahsak ding a, na nuamsa toto ding hi, a ci hi
Hih thuteng khempeuh kumpi Nebukhadnezzar' tungah hong tung hi
Tua zawh kha sawmlenih khit ciangin kumpipa zong Babylon khua kumpi innkhumzang huan sungah vak a
Babylon khua bangzah takin lian ahi hiam? Kumpi khuapi ding leh, ka vangliatna ka thahatna a kilatna dingin ka lam ahi hi, a ci hi
Tua thute a kamsung pan a pusuah ma-in vantung panin aw khat hong ging a, “Kumpi Nebukhadnezzar aw, ka thugen na ngai in. Na kumpi gam hong kilakkhiatsak zo hi

Mite lak pan hong kihawlkhia ding a, gamsate tawh na tengkhawm ding hi. Bawngtal bangin kum sagih sung lopa na ne ding hi. Tua ciangin, Pasian in mihingte' kumpi gam uk a, a teel mi peuhpeuh kumpi a suaksak thei hi, na ci ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua hun lianin Nebukhadnezzar' tungah tua thukhenna a hong tung hi. Mite lak panin Nebukhadnezzar kihawlkhia a, bawngtal bangin lopa a ne takpi hi. A pumpi tungah daitui kia a, a pumpi tunga a multe keelmul bangin sau a, a khutcinte muvanlai khecin bangin a hong sau hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “A kisehsa hun a cin' ciangin keimah Nebukhadnezzar in vantung lam ka ento a, ka khuatheihna a hong tungkik hi. A nungta tawntung a Lianpen Pasian' min phatin, zahtakna leh minthan'na ka pia hi. “Amah in a tawntungin uk ding a, ama gam kip tawntung ding hi
Amah in leitung mite bangmahin a sim kei a, vantung mite leh leitung mite ama khutnuai ahi hi. Ama deihna kuamah in nial theilo a, a bawlnate kuamah in a hang a kan thei kei hi

“Ka khuatheihna a hong tun'kik ciangin ka kumpi za, ka minthan'na, leh ka gam minthan'nate a hong kipia kik hi. Ka miliante leh ka thudot mite in hong muak uh a, nidang sangin a lianzaw minthan'na leh ka kumpi za a hong kipia kik hi
Tu-in keimah Nebukhadnezzar in Vantung Kumpipa phatin, zahtakin a min ka thangsak hi. Ama bawlna khempeuh a man hi. Amah a tawntungin thuman a, a kiphasakin a gamtate a neusak hi,” a ci hi.
